atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines design tokens in the CSS theme namespace.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS: applies utility classes inline in CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS: adds styles to a specific layer (base, components, utilities).

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines a custom utility class.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines a custom variant.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: declares a content source for scanning utility class usage.
